title: Connect With Us
description: Connect With Us SRNL Contact Information Media Contacts Journalists with questions about the Savannah River National Laboratory, may contact: Jeff Carterjeffrey.carter@srnl.doe.gov  Technology Transfer For information about working with SRNL in the development and use of new technology, contact: Daren Timmonsdaren.timmons@srnl.doe.gov Protocol Office Questions about business-related events or visits to SRNL should be directed to:  Kelsie TaylorKelsie.Taylor@srnl.doe.gov...
text:
Institutional Biosafety Committee
The Institutional Biosafety Committee (IBC) of the Savannah River National Laboratory (SRNL) provides guidance for and oversight of work with potentially biohazardous organisms in order to protect the health and safety of workers, the public, and the environment. Research conducted or sponsored by SRNL will be performed in compliance with federal and state regulations and standards.
The IBC must review and approve all research and teaching projects involving hazardous biological materials. At SRNL this research involves working with Recombinant or Synthetic Nucleic Acids.
Minutes of the IBC’s meetings are available to the public upon request. To request a copy of the minutes, email SRNL_Communications@srnl.doe.gov, subject: IBC minutes.
